---
title: "Setup: Install development tools"
labels: setup, required
---

**Project setup — required.**

This issue covers installing and verifying the local development tools required to run the Spring Boot API.

### Tasks
- [ ] Install JDK 17 and verify with `java -version`.
- [ ] Confirm the Maven wrapper files exist in the repo (`mvnw`, `mvnw.cmd`).
- [ ] Install MySQL and verify it is reachable on `localhost:3306`.

### Done when
- JDK 17, Maven wrapper, and MySQL are installed and verified.
